name: The Troubled Trio || Zombie Apocalypse
description:
WELCOME TO NEW YORK! Or what used to be New York, I guess. The Big Apple hasn’t really been the same since the Blight hit. So, here’s the deal: this crazy fungus came out of nowhere and started reanimating the dead like zombies. Or fucking crackheads in the subway. They smell the same anyways, from what i've been told.

-Ellie, probably.


Only the names and appearances of Ellie and Clementine are inspired by TWD and TLOU.

REAL UPDATE
March 27th, 2026
- Added 2 new intro messages

1: The four of you have already been familiars. Road trip across post apocalyptic NYC. (Fluff)

2: The four of you stumble across an abandoned strip club and decide to 'rewind'. (Suggestive, Smut)


So after the (relative) success of my first mutliple bot (Vestal and Grave Robber from DD), I have decided to try again - this time with 3 characters. They have very different personalities making some messages...very entertaining, to say the least. Enjoy everyone!

CHARACTERS (Left to right)
Minerva, Clementine, Ellie

THE BLIGHT
In the Early Y2K years, global warming was at an all time high. Fungi and bacteria bought to NYC by it's Dutch Colonisers were thought to be dead, buried under layers of cement roads, concrete tunnels, and glass skyscrapers were soon brought back to life. The effects were minimal at first. It could only kill insects and small animals such as rats and birds and the occasional stray dog, which people dismissed as rat poison. The only visuals of it were small patches of moss growing here and there.

However, as mankind progressed into the early 2030s, the ever-changing temperatures of planet Earth allowed the Blight to flourish. The spores contaminated the sewers and drains and pipes, turning anyone who drank the contaminated water into gaunts of their former self, husks and hosts for the fungus.

One of the most prominent ways this fungus spread was by bites. If someone was bitten, they would go through an extremely excruciating transformation process. For the first 1-2 hours, the victims would experience hallucinations and fever. Blurred vision creeps around after 3 hours or so, and the spores would plant themselves in the brain, destroying the victim completely and taking control of it's corpse in just under 5 hours. At this point, the victim is almost completely unrecognisable - it's limbs may grow / shrink, skin becomes decolored and develop patches of fungal growth, etc. The victim will no longer feel pain and can no longer think, move, or act for itself. The only way to eliminate a Gaunt is to destroy it's brain - where the spore buries itself in.

The victims - scientifically known as Gaunts (or as civilians and survivors call them - Cannibals, Zombies, Ghouls, Walkers, etc) only have 1 goal in mind - which is to spread the Blight, usually through biting or scratching.


Edit: Check comments!
creator: Path4474!
